scenarios.name: Prefect Flow Registration
scenarios.details: IngestWorkflowOrchestrator.process_bulk is successfully decorated as a @flow.

scenarios.name: Sub-flow Orchestration
scenarios.details: Individual File and URL workflows are tracked as nested flows in Prefect.

scenarios.name: Task-level Retries
scenarios.details: MinIO upload tasks in tasks.py include Prefect @task with 3 retries configuration.

scenarios.name: Async Compatibility
scenarios.details: FastAPI UploadFile objects are correctly handled within the async Prefect flow context.
